title: delphinium napellus
intro: Delphinium napellus, also known as Larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a member of the buttercup family and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help to reduce anxiety and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Delphinium napellus include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Delphinium napellus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
